Assistant: <think>
response: Reduce $13(3x-2)\equiv 26\pmod 8$ to $(3x-2)\equiv 2\pmod {\frac{8}{\gcd(13,8)}}$, which is $(3x-2)\equiv 2\pmod 8$. Add $2$ to both sides to get $3x\equiv 4\pmod 8$.
